info.name: Mastercard Get a List of Countries
Mastercard Get a List of Country Subdivisions

params.name: country_code
params.description: Three digit alpha country code as defined in ISO 3166-1

items.docs: Returns a list of country subdivisions for a given country

info.name: Mastercard Get a List of Merchant Categories

items.docs: Returns a list of merchant categories

info.name: Mastercard Get a List of Merchant Details

params.name: limit
params.description: The number of items to be retrieved

params.name: offset
params.description: The page offset used for the query

params.name: distance
params.description: Distance measurement for calculating the radius search. Optional The length of distance from the centroid point. Value string(<25). The default will be 5 units

params.name: distance_unit
params.description: Unit of measurement for calculating the radius search. Optional. Measurement of distance unit in miles or kilometers. Value string (MILE or KM)

items.docs: Returns detailed information on merchants based on the provided query parameters
